English (US): See a new word in a desktop browser?
Use Chrome and Safari extensions to quickly select, translate, and generate flashcards with a single click.
iOS users can also take advantage of the iOS Safari extension for iPhone and iPad.
See a new word in real life?
Use Vocably instead of Google Translate to translate and automatically generate a flashcard.
Want to say something but don't know a word?
Find the right word in your native language using the Vocably app. Save it as a flashcard to review later.
Seamlessly works with most e-book readers for Android
Long-tap any word in an e-book to see its translations and save it as a high-quality flashcard.
All of your cards are saved in the cloud
You can study them using an integrated SRS system on any of your mobile devices.
